mapper.insert: insert into contributions ( id, question, answer, corrections, confirmed_by, confirmed_at, question_tsv, answer_tsv, corrections_tsv ) values ( #{record.id}, #{record.question}, #{record.answer}, #{record.correctionsJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{record.confirmedBy}, #{record.confirmedAt}, to_tsvector('simple'::regconfig, #{record.question}), to_tsvector('simple'::regconfig, #{record.answer}), to_tsvector('simple'::regconfig, #{record.correctionsJson}) )
mapper.select: select id, question, answer, corrections::text as corrections_json, confirmed_by, confirmed_at from contributions order by confirmed_at desc, id desc
